chunks.title: Call to Ascribe Glory
chunks.reason: An opening invitation for the sons of the mighty to honor Yahweh with glory and strength.

chunks.title: The Seven Voices of Yahweh
chunks.reason: A structured catalog describing the seven specific powerful acts of Yahweh's voice in nature.

chunks.title: Yahweh as Eternal King and Giver of Peace
chunks.reason: A concluding declaration of God's eternal reign followed by a promise of strength and peace for His people.
